title: Revise World Travel, Time Zone, and Global Control popup layouts

requirements.summary: Revise World Travel popup layout with tailored structure, clear visual organization, and reduced size
acceptanceCriteria: World Travel popup is visibly smaller than its previous size
Content is organized with clear sections, consistent spacing, and visual dividers appropriate to World Travel content
No content is clipped or overflows the popup container

file_operations.description: Reduce the Dialog width and height by adjusting the DialogContent className (e.g., from 'max-w-4xl' to 'max-w-3xl' or smaller). Introduce clear visual sections for Live Journeys, Upcoming Journeys, and Past Journeys using dividers or card groupings. Apply consistent spacing (e.g., gap-4 or gap-6) and padding between journey groups. Ensure journey cards have appropriate internal structure with labeled headings and organized schedule displays. Verify that all content remains visible and no overflow occurs with the reduced popup size.

requirements.summary: Revise Time Zone popup layout with tailored structure, clear visual organization, and reduced size
acceptanceCriteria: Time Zone popup is visibly smaller than its previous size
Timezone content is presented in a well-structured, readable layout appropriate to time zone data
No content is clipped or overflows the popup container

file_operations.description: Locate the Time Zone dialog (timezone overlay controls dialog) and reduce its Dialog dimensions by adjusting the DialogContent className to a smaller max-width (e.g., 'max-w-md' or 'max-w-lg'). Structure the timezone offset controls with clear section labels (e.g., 'Select Timezone Offset'). Format the offset dropdown or input field with proper spacing and labeling. Add visual separators between different control groups if multiple controls exist. Ensure the layout is optimized for displaying timezone data (offset values, region names) in a compact, readable format. Verify no content overflow or clipping occurs with the reduced size.

requirements.summary: Revise Global Control popup layout with tailored structure, clear visual organization, and reduced size
acceptanceCriteria: Global Control popup is visibly smaller than its previous size
Controls and settings are organized in a structured, clearly grouped layout appropriate to global control options
No content is clipped or overflows the popup container

file_operations.description: Reduce the Dialog dimensions by adjusting the DialogContent className to a smaller max-width (e.g., from current size to 'max-w-md' or 'max-w-sm'). Organize controls into logical groups with clear section headings (e.g., 'Display Settings', 'Map Settings', 'Music Settings'). Use visual dividers (Separator component or border classes) between control groups. Apply consistent vertical spacing (space-y-4 or space-y-3) between form fields and groups. Ensure toggle switches, input fields, and buttons are properly aligned and labeled. Verify that all settings remain accessible and visible within the reduced popup size without overflow or clipping.
